title: acer japonicum f. aconitifolium
intro: Acer japonicum f. aconitifolium, also known as the Japanese maple with deeply cut leaves, is a cultivar of the Japanese maple tree (Acer japonicum) characterized by its unique, deeply lobed leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer japonicum f. aconitifolium are thought to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an extract or infusion, and can be found in traditional Asian medicine formulas, such as those used in traditional Chinese medicine and Kampo.
